merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Kigali was established, with David J.S. Manbey as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, coinciding with Rwandan independence.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on July 1, 1962, when the American Embassy at Kigali was established, with David J.S. Manbey as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1962-07-01) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms the American Embassy at Kigali was established on Rwandan independence day.
